scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/ && cp announce.html dist/ && cp meeting.html dist/ && cp meeting.js dist/ && cp meeting.css dist/ && cp supply-chain.html dist/ && cp compliance-monitor.html dist/
scripts.start: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 5000 --directory dist
scripts.test: node --check supabase/functions/processEntryFee.js supabase/functions/processWithdrawal.js supabase/functions/createHandshakeSession.js supabase/functions/createStripeCheckout.js supabase/functions/stripeWebhook.js supabase/functions/aiAgentAnalyze.js supabase/functions/newsWebhook.js supabase/functions/generatePressRelease.js supabase/functions/syndicateAnnouncement.js supabase/functions/generateInstantRoom.js supabase/functions/documentBridge.js supabase/functions/aiSecretaryTools.js supabase/functions/aiComplianceLawyer.js supabase/functions/supplyChainCreateShipment.js supabase/functions/supplyChainUpdateStatus.js supabase/functions/supplyChainTrackMilestone.js supabase/functions/complianceRunWorkflow.js supabase/functions/complianceGetReport.js supabase/functions/meetingNegotiationState.js && node -e "import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; const sql = readFileSync('supabase/schema.sql', 'utf8'); if (!sql.includes('green_acc_deals')) throw new Error('Supabase schema missing green_acc_deals table'); if (!sql.includes('entry_fee_status')) throw new Error('Schema missing entry_fee_status field'); if (!sql.includes('deal_announcements')) throw new Error('Schema missing deal_announcements table'); if (!sql.includes('global_news')) throw new Error('Schema missing global_news table'); if (!sql.includes('instant_rooms')) throw new Error('Schema missing instant_rooms table'); if (!sql.includes('compliance_logs')) throw new Error('Schema missing compliance_logs table'); if (!sql.includes('supply_shipments')) throw new Error('Schema missing supply_shipments table'); if (!sql.includes('supply_milestones')) throw new Error('Schema missing supply_milestones table'); if (!sql.includes('compliance_runs')) throw new Error('Schema missing compliance_runs table'); if (!sql.includes('compliance_checks')) throw new Error('Schema missing compliance_checks table'); if (!sql.includes('meeting_negotiations')) throw new Error('Schema missing meeting_negotiations table'); if (!sql.includes('meeting_presence')) throw new Error('Schema missing meeting_presence table'); console.log('Validation passed');"
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/ && cp announce.html dist/ && cp meeting.html dist/ && cp meeting.js dist/ && cp meeting.css dist/ && cp success.html dist/ && cp cancel.html dist/ && cp deal-room.html dist/ && cp fulfillment.html dist/ && cp marketplace.html dist/ && cp meeting-room.html dist/ && cp tokens.html dist/ && vite build
scripts.test: python3 -m py_compile backend/server.py && node --check supabase/functions/processEntryFee.js supabase/functions/processWithdrawal.js supabase/functions/createHandshakeSession.js supabase/functions/createStripeCheckout.js supabase/functions/stripeWebhook.js supabase/functions/aiAgentAnalyze.js supabase/functions/newsWebhook.js supabase/functions/generatePressRelease.js supabase/functions/syndicateAnnouncement.js supabase/functions/generateInstantRoom.js supabase/functions/documentBridge.js supabase/functions/aiSecretaryTools.js supabase/functions/aiComplianceLawyer.js supabase/functions/marketplaceEngine.js supabase/functions/auditContractCompliance.js supabase/functions/supplyChainCoordinator.js supabase/functions/dealClearanceRoom.js supabase/functions/dealFulfillment.js supabase/functions/stripeConnectOnboard.js supabase/functions/meetingRoom.js supabase/functions/manageApiTokens.js supabase/functions/greenBubblesDefense.js && node -e "import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; const sql = readFileSync('supabase/schema.sql', 'utf8'); const m4 = readFileSync('supabase/migrations/04_green_bubbles_defense.sql', 'utf8'); const m5 = readFileSync('supabase/migrations/05_green_container_foundation.sql', 'utf8'); if (!sql.includes('green_acc_deals')) throw new Error('Supabase schema missing green_acc_deals table'); if (!sql.includes('entry_fee_status')) throw new Error('Schema missing entry_fee_status field'); if (!sql.includes('deal_announcements')) throw new Error('Schema missing deal_announcements table'); if (!sql.includes('global_news')) throw new Error('Schema missing global_news table'); if (!sql.includes('instant_rooms')) throw new Error('Schema missing instant_rooms table'); if (!sql.includes('compliance_logs')) throw new Error('Schema missing compliance_logs table'); if (!sql.includes('marketplace_listings')) throw new Error('Schema missing marketplace_listings table'); if (!sql.includes('user_profiles')) throw new Error('Schema missing user_profiles table'); if (!sql.includes('legal_audit_logs')) throw new Error('Schema missing legal_audit_logs table'); if (!sql.includes('supply_chain_tracking')) throw new Error('Schema missing supply_chain_tracking table'); if (!sql.includes('deal_clearances')) throw new Error('Schema missing deal_clearances table'); if (!sql.includes('deal_fulfillments')) throw new Error('Schema missing deal_fulfillments table'); if (!sql.includes('meeting_memos')) throw new Error('Schema missing meeting_memos table'); if (!sql.includes('api_tokens')) throw new Error('Schema missing api_tokens table'); if (!m4.includes('threat_profiles')) throw new Error('Migration 04 missing threat_profiles table'); if (!m4.includes('analysis_runs')) throw new Error('Migration 04 missing analysis_runs table'); if (!m4.includes('threat_observations')) throw new Error('Migration 04 missing threat_observations table'); if (!m4.includes('containment_actions')) throw new Error('Migration 04 missing containment_actions table'); if (!m4.includes('security_capacity')) throw new Error('Migration 04 missing security_capacity table'); if (!m4.includes('daily_security_reports')) throw new Error('Migration 04 missing daily_security_reports table'); if (!m4.includes('security_decisions')) throw new Error('Migration 04 missing security_decisions table'); if (!m5.includes('green_containers')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing green_containers table'); if (!m5.includes('green_container_objects')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing green_container_objects table'); if (!m5.includes('green_container_permissions')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing green_container_permissions table'); if (!m5.includes('green_container_consents')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing green_container_consents table'); if (!m5.includes('green_container_access_log')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing green_container_access_log table'); if (!m5.includes('green_container_integrity_checks')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing green_container_integrity_checks table'); if (!m5.includes('agent_registry')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing agent_registry table'); if (!m5.includes('agent_permissions')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing agent_permissions table'); if (!m5.includes('agent_tasks')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing agent_tasks table'); if (!m5.includes('agent_actions')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing agent_actions table'); if (!m5.includes('automation_rules')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing automation_rules table'); if (!m5.includes('automation_approvals')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing automation_approvals table'); if (!m5.includes('payment_authorizations')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing payment_authorizations table'); if (!m5.includes('trust_decisions')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing trust_decisions table'); if (!m5.includes('external_connectors')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing external_connectors table'); if (!m5.includes('connector_actions')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing connector_actions table'); if (!m5.includes('ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY')) throw new Error('Migration 05 missing RLS'); if (m5.includes('allow all') || m5.includes('Allow all') || m5.includes('ALLOW ALL')) throw new Error('Migration 05 contains forbidden ALLOW ALL policy'); console.log('Greens ACC validation passed');"
